title: Here I Am: Messenger of Love and Justice!
overview: As Mayumi is chained up and her clothes being whipped off her, who is to save her but a masked, nude and well-endowed superhero named Kekko Kamen. Multi-talented with great fighting skills and special moves such as "Muff-ication", Kekko Kamen fights for justice, freedom and the naked truth.

title: Crash! Kekko Kamen Vs. the Muscular Monster
overview: Kekko Kamen squares off against the gym teacher.

title: Mystery! The Legend of the Evil Android!
overview: Kekko Kamen squares off with an exchanged student armed with tentacles.

title: Crisis! Kekko Kamen Only Lives Twice!
overview: Kekko Kamen squares off with a perverted picture-taking samurai who just can't stop taking naughty photos of the girls on campus.
